name: Rich Brownie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the shortening.
Use a spoon to mix until uniform.
2. Cut in the shortening using either a pastry blender or your fingertips.
The mixture should look like chocolate cornmeal.
3. Transfer the batter into a plastic bag or jar and seal tightly.
Label and store at room temperature.
4. To use: In a mixing bowl, add 2 eggs and 1 teaspoon vanilla or orange extract.
Beat slightly. Stir in 4 tablespoons melted butter or margarine that has been cooled.
5. Lightly spoon 2 cups of the mix into the bowl; do not pack when measuring.
Beat well with a spoon to make a smooth batter.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 8 x 8 x 2 inch pan.
Bake in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees F for 30 to 35 minutes,
or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the brownies to cool in the pan before cutting into squares.
